Earl Harlaw
Earl Harlaw, by The Mico ©
Allegiance House Harlaw
Culture Ironborn
Died 300 AC (possibly)
Deepwood Motte
Book A Dance with Dragons (appendix)

Earl Harlaw is a member of House Harlaw and one of the crew on Asha Greyjoy's ship Black Wind.[1] His relation to Lord Rodrik Harlaw, the head of the house, is currently unknown.

Recent Events[ ]

A Dance with Dragons[ ]

Earl and with the rest of Asha Greyjoy's supporters sail to Deepwood Motte as Asha contemplates her next move after the kingsmoot on Old Wyk. His fate after the liberation of the castle is unknown.[2][N 1]
